payload.description: Conceptual design for discussion at East Fordham Road with left turn rerouting, dedicated right turn lane, local stop, SBS stop, bus layover, extended pedestrian islands, and one-way conversion of E 189th St

evidence_refs.source_quote: EAST FORDHAM ROAD

CONCEPTUAL DESIGN FOR DISCUSSION E. Fordham Road - Left turn rerouting Potential to remove signal if EB approach on E. 193rd St. is right turn only Prohibit NB left turn to create a longer SB left-turn lane Dedicated RT Lane Local Stop SBS Stop Bus Layover Existing Sidewalk Ban EB and WB LTs at Fordham Road and extend existing pedestrian islands Dedicated RT Lane Shorten local bus stop to add parking E 189th will become one-way WB as part of the Fordham Plaza Project Create longer left-turn lane One-Way
